models.name: certification_tracking
models.description: Compliance certification lifecycle management table tracking certification issued dates, expiry dates, days until expiry, compliance framework mappings (SOC2/GDPR/ISO27001), renewal workflow flags, and certification status. Purpose: Manages employee certifications and compliance credentials, tracks expiration dates, and enables proactive renewal workflows. Essential for certification expiration alerts, compliance audit reporting, and ensuring employees maintain required certifications. Used in queries to find certifications expiring in the next 30 days, to identify expired certifications, to track certification status by compliance framework, to generate renewal reminders, and to join with users for employee certification reports. Joins with users for employee information, with activities for training that led to certification, and serves as the primary table for all certification-related queries.

properties.description: Certified user (FK to users) Examples: e.g., NC10000, DJ15852, QY15009, etc..
Related skill (optional FK) Examples: e.g., SK0001, SK0055, .
Name of certification Examples: e.g., GDPR Data Protection Certification, SOC2 Compliance Training, Information Security Awareness, etc..
Type category Examples: e.g., compliance, technical, professional.
When cert was awarded Examples: e.g., 2025-06-15, 2024-08-20, 2025-01-10.
Must be renewed (e.g., 1, e.g., 1, e.g., 1, e.g., 1, e.g., 1, e.g., 1)
Related standard Examples: e.g., GDPR, SOC2, ISO27001.

properties.kpis: [{"name": "Expiring in 30 Days", "sql": "COUNT(*) WHERE days_until_expiry BETWEEN 0 AND 30 AND is_expired=0"}, {"name": "Expired Certifications", "sql": "COUNT(*) WHERE is_expired=1"}, {"name": "Critical Certs", "sql": "COUNT(*) WHERE is_critical=1"}, {"name": "Renewal in Progress", "sql": "COUNT(*) WHERE renewal_in_progress=1"}]
properties.complianceUseCases: ["Audit Compliance: Track valid certifications by framework", "Expiry Management: Alert on certs expiring within 30/60/90 days", "Renewal Workflow: Monitor renewal_in_progress for training completion", "User Certification Status: Show all certs per user with expiry status"]
